CreateRule.description: Grants permission to create a Recycle Bin retention rule

DeleteRule.description: Grants permission to delete a Recycle Bin retention rule

GetRule.description: Grants permission to get detailed information about a Recycle Bin retention rule

ListRules.description: Grants permission to list the Recycle Bin retention rules in the Region

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags associated with a resource

LockRule.description: Grants permission to lock an existing Recycle Bin retention rule

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add or update tags of a resource

UnlockRule.description: Grants permission to unlock an existing Recycle Bin retention rule

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags associated with a resource

UpdateRule.description: Grants permission to update an existing Recycle Bin retention rule

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag's key and value in a request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys in a request

rbin:Attribute/ResourceType.description: Filters access by the resource type of the existing rule

rbin:Request/ResourceType.description: Filters access by the resource type in a request
